terms.definition: The m×n matrix of first partial derivatives ∂f_i/∂x_j for a function f : ℝⁿ → ℝᵐ.
The n×n matrix of second partial derivatives ∂²f/∂x_i∂x_j for a scalar function f : ℝⁿ → ℝ.
The derivative of a first partial derivative; entries of the Hessian when taken with respect to two coordinates.
How fast the gradient of a scalar function changes with position; encoded locally by the Hessian.
Multiplying a row vector (often a upstream gradient) by a Jacobian to propagate sensitivities without forming the full matrix.
